Package minet.layer

Interface Layer

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    Linear, ReLU, Sequential, Sigmoid, Softmax
    public interface Layer
    An interface for all layers.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      org.jblas.DoubleMatrix backward​(org.jblas.DoubleMatrix gY)
      Computing the gradient of the layer's parameters and the input when applying forward(org.jblas.DoubleMatrix).
      org.jblas.DoubleMatrix forward​(org.jblas.DoubleMatrix X)
      Computing the output of applying the layer to input X, i.e.
      java.util.List<org.jblas.DoubleMatrix> getAllGradients​(java.util.List<org.jblas.DoubleMatrix> grads)
      Collect the gradients of all the weight matrices and bias vectors of the layer.
      java.util.List<org.jblas.DoubleMatrix> getAllWeights​(java.util.List<org.jblas.DoubleMatrix> weights)
      Collect all the weight matrices and bias vectors of the layer.

    • Method Detail

      • forward

        org.jblas.DoubleMatrix forward​(org.jblas.DoubleMatrix X)
        Computing the output of applying the layer to input X, i.e. Y = Layer(X).
        Parameters:
        X - a [minibatch_size x input_dims] matrix, each row is an input instance
        Returns:
        a [minibatch_size x output_dims] matrix, each row is the output of the corresponding instance

      • backward

        org.jblas.DoubleMatrix backward​(org.jblas.DoubleMatrix gY)
        Computing the gradient of the layer's parameters and the input when applying forward(org.jblas.DoubleMatrix).
        Parameters:
        gY - a [minibatch_size x output_dims] matrix, each row is dL/dY
        Returns:
        a [minibatch_size x input_dims] matrix, each row is dL/dX where L is a loss function (@see Loss).

      • getAllWeights

        java.util.List<org.jblas.DoubleMatrix> getAllWeights​(java.util.List<org.jblas.DoubleMatrix> weights)
        Collect all the weight matrices and bias vectors of the layer.
        Parameters:
        weights - a list of matrices (updated accordingly)
        Returns:
        the same list.

      • getAllGradients

        java.util.List<org.jblas.DoubleMatrix> getAllGradients​(java.util.List<org.jblas.DoubleMatrix> grads)
        Collect the gradients of all the weight matrices and bias vectors of the layer.
        Parameters:
        grads - a list of matrices (updated accordingly)
        Returns:
        the same list.
